title: [codereview] P3: uart1 node not enabled in heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_procpu.dts; chosen override alone insufficient without &uart1 { status = "okay"; ... } in board or overlay
description: The pinctrl addition is good but without the uart1 node definition and status=okay in the DTS (or gateway overlay), the console change will fail to build or run. This is a functional gap for the Heltec bug fix. Also add to aliases if needed. Fix as real work even if P3.
